purpose: Evaluate whether an organization or account is entitled to perform an action based on plan tier, usage, storage, concurrency, and feature access.

endpoints.description: Evaluate whether the requested action is allowed under the current plan and usage snapshot.

sidecar_specification.purpose: Plan-aware entitlement and quota evaluator for gated actions.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use before starting paid or quota-limited operations such as runs, GPU tasks, uploads, or premium features.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use as the billing ledger itself, checkout processor, or invoice generator.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Build a plan descriptor and current usage snapshot. 2) Call /entitlements/evaluate with an action. 3) Proceed only when allowed is true.

common_calls.description: Evaluate a monthly pipeline run request

failure_modes.condition: Requested quantity exceeds remaining plan allowance
failure_modes.symptom: allowed false with a limit reason
failure_modes.recovery: Reduce the request or upgrade the plan

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Keep evaluation pure by passing a normalized plan object and usage snapshot into the module. Support action types like pipeline_run, concurrent_run, storage_write, gpu_run, or custom feature flags.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Mixing live database reads into the evaluator makes it harder to test and reuse. Remaining quota may be count-based, byte-based, or feature-flag based.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Model plan limits explicitly and compute remaining allowance per action with deterministic numeric rules.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not embed checkout, subscriptions syncing, or provider webhooks in this module.

test_cases.name: deny when monthly run limit reached
